arabicText: رِيُّ الزَّمَانِ سَقَى الْأَرْوَاحَ بِالْحِكَمِ الْعَالِيَةِ الَّتِي تُزِيلُ الظُّلُمَاتِ
latinTransliteration: Riyyuz-zamāni saqal-arwāḥa bil-ḥikamil-‘āliyeti-llatī tuzīluẓ-ẓulumāt
englishTranslation: Riyy al-Zaman has watered the spirits with sublime wisdom that dispels darkness.
wolofTranslationStandard: Riyy al-Zaman sotti na xam-xam ci ruu yi buy dindi lëndëm.
wolofalAjamiScript: رِيُّ الزَّمَانِ سُتِّ نَ خَمْ خَمْ سِ رُو يِ بُيْ دِنْدِ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ

arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا السَّالِكُ لَا تَتْبَعْ هَوَى النَّفْسِ وَاكْفِ الشَّرَّ تَعِشْ كَرِيماً
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhas-sāliku lā tatba‘ hawal-nafsi wa-kfi-sh-sharra ta‘ish karīmā
englishTranslation: O traveler, do not follow the desires of the lower self and refrain from harm, you will live honorably.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw mi dox ci yoon wi, bul topp say rëx-rëx te dindi mbugal ngir dund gu rafet.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مِ دُخْ سِ يُونْ وِ بُلْ تُپْ سَيْ رِخْ رِخْ تِ دِنْدِ مْبُجَلْ نْجِرْ دُنْدْ جُ رَفِتْ

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنْ عُلَمَاءِ السُّوءِ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِآيَاتِ اللَّهِ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلًا
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar min ‘ulamā'is-sū'il-ladhīna yashtarūna bi-āyātillāhi thamanan qalīl
englishTranslation: And beware of the scholars of falsehood who sell the signs of Allah for a miserable price.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul boroom xam-xam yu daganadi yi buy jaay aaya Yàlla yi ci jëg bu néew.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ دَجَنَدِ يِ بُيْ جَايْ آيَا يَٚlَّ يِ سِ جِجْ بُ نِيوْ

arabicText: وَتَمَسَّكْ بِالْإِخْلَاصِ فِي كُلِّ عَمَلٍ تَنَلْ غَايَةَ الْمَطْلُوبِ عِنْدَ الْمَوْلَى
latinTransliteration: Wa tamassak bil-ikhlāṣi fī kulli ‘amalin tanal ghāyatal-maṭlūbi ‘indal-Mawlā
englishTranslation: And hold fast to sincerity in every deed, you will attain the ultimate goal with the Lord.
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral sa xol ci sa liggeey yépp ngir nga am li nga bëgg ci sa Boroom.
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجِٜrَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ سَ لِجِࣺي يِٚpْ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِ نْجَ بِجِّ سِ سَ بُرُومْ

arabicText: رِيُّ الزَّمَانِ سَقَى الْأَرْوَاحَ بِالْحِكَمِ الْعَالِيَةِ الَّتِي تُزِيلُ الظُّلُمَاتِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Riyyuz-zamāni saqal-arwāḥa bil-ḥikamil-‘āliyeti-llatī tuzīluẓ-ẓulumāt (5)
englishTranslation: Riyy al-Zaman has watered the spirits with sublime wisdom that dispels darkness. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Riyy al-Zaman sotti na xam-xam ci ruu yi buy dindi lëndëm. (Wers 5)

latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhas-sāliku lā tatba‘ hawal-nafsi wa-kfi-sh-sharra ta‘ish karīmā (6)
englishTranslation: O traveler, do not follow the desires of the lower self and refrain from harm, you will live honorably. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw mi dox ci yoon wi, bul topp say rëx-rëx te dindi mbugal ngir dund gu rafet. (Wers 6)

latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar min ‘ulamā'is-sū'il-ladhīna yashtarūna bi-āyātillāhi thamanan qalīl (7)

wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul boroom xam-xam yu daganadi yi buy jaay aaya Yàlla yi ci jëg bu néew. (Wers 7)

englishTranslation: And hold fast to sincerity in every deed, you will attain the ultimate goal with the Lord. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral sa xol ci sa liggeey yépp ngir nga am li nga bëgg ci sa Boroom. (Wers 8)
